zh-cn.ItemComponent_Ingestible_tooltip: 可食用 摄入量$amount$ 摄入方式 $methods$
zh-cn.ItemComponent_Ingestible_additive_toolti: 该道具可作为食品添加剂（通过指令 %%com_furniture_mealPrep_displayName%%）
zh-cn.ItemComponent_Ingestible_nontoken_toolti: 该食物道具不可在食堂直接食用，也无法混入添加剂
zh-cn.ItemComponent_Ingestible_token_tooltip: 该食物道具会在食堂添加食用指令，可混入添加剂（需要先执行指令 %%com_furniture_mealPrep_displayName%%）
zh-cn.ItemComponentTemplate_Craftable_Recipe_t:
耗时：$time$分钟
技能需求：$skillreqs$
道具消耗：$itemreqs$

$basetooltip$

en-us.ItemComponent_Equippable_tooltip_covers: Extra Coverage on layer $layer$ on slot $covers$
en-us.ItemComponent_Ingestible_additive_toolti: This item can be used as a food additive (via the %%com_furniture_mealPrep_displayName%% command)
en-us.ItemComponent_Ingestible_nontoken_toolti: This food item cannot be eaten directly at the canteen and cannot be mixed with additives
en-us.ItemComponent_Ingestible_token_tooltip: This food item will add an eating command at the canteen and can be mixed with additives (requires executing the %%com_furniture_mealPrep_displayName%% command first)
en-us.ItemComponentTemplate_Craftable_Recipe_t:
Time Required: $time$ minutes
Skill Requirement: $skillreqs$
Item Consumption: $itemreqs$

$basetooltip$
